description: Golden benchmark set: every catalog item paired with a fixed synthetic input photo. Cases marked hard=true form the small regression subset (the failure modes found in the image-quality audit). Inputs are project-generated synthetic people so the benchmark is shippable.

cases.notes: ornate multi-stone necklace; fidelity stress (stone count/colors)
product photo also shows earrings; prompt_hint must exclude them
strongest necklace baseline; pendant scale + chain contrast
collar fit; many small dangling elements
HARD: input hair partially covers ears; strict occlusion rules apply
single product hoop must become a matching pair
strongest ring baseline; two rings in product photo, apply one
strongest bracelet baseline; complex enamel pattern fidelity
multi-coil wrap; risk of coil count drift
white garment on light background; edge fidelity
pattern fidelity: stripe spacing/direction must survive
HARD: documented midi->maxi hem drift + leg erasure failure
knee-length hem; lower legs must stay visible
lower-body-only swap; top must remain untouched
